description: Harden tenant boundaries across core backend modules while preserving public cross-merchant browsing and enforcing strict merchant ownership for private user flows and merchant-admin operations.

userStories.title: Ralph control plane for isolation hardening
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want Ralph execution artifacts initialized for this feature so that each hardening iteration is traceable and resumable.
acceptanceCriteria: tasks/prd-multi-merchant-isolation.md exists and matches the approved two-layer model (public browse + private strict ownership).
scripts/ralph/prd.json contains ordered stories US-001..US-007 with passes=false for a fresh run.
Previous run artifacts are archived under scripts/ralph/archive/2026-05-05-thesis-upgrade/ (prd.json and progress.txt).
Manual validation: docs/superpowers/specs/2026-05-05-multi-merchant-isolation-design.md is referenced as the source design for execution.
userStories.notes: Initialized on 2026-05-05: previous run archived, source PRD created, and Ralph control-plane files reset for this branch.

userStories.title: Merchant scope guard abstraction and baseline tests
userStories.description: As a backend engineer, I want a shared merchant-scope guard so that tenant checks are consistent and reusable across modules.
acceptanceCriteria: A new guard component is added under core/backend/sky-server/src/main/java/com/sky/... and reused by service-layer isolation paths.
Unit tests cover merchant account, platform account, explicit cross-merchant request rejection, and explicit merchant requirement for private flows.
Automated validation: mvn -f core/backend/pom.xml test -pl sky-server -Dtest=*Scope*Test passes.
Manual validation: a merchant account token requesting another merchant's private resource returns a business denial response.
userStories.notes: Added MerchantScopeGuard and baseline unit tests; reused guard in ReportServiceImpl and WorkspaceServiceImpl. Verified with mvn -f core/backend/pom.xml test -pl sky-server "-Dtest=*Scope*Test".

userStories.title: Admin domain isolation for employee and catalog management
userStories.description: As a merchant admin, I want admin operations constrained to my own merchant so that cross-tenant management is impossible.
acceptanceCriteria: Employee, merchant-business-status, category, dish, and setmeal admin operations reject cross-merchant access for merchant accounts.
Platform-admin behavior remains available for allowed global endpoints.
Automated validation: targeted WebMvcTest/service tests for employee/category/dish/setmeal/merchant isolation paths pass.
UI verification: under merchant-admin login, admin pages do not expose successful edits/updates to another merchant's resources.

userStories.title: Private user-chain isolation for cart and order flows
userStories.description: As an end user, I want cart and order operations bound to one merchant so that data cannot mix across merchants.
acceptanceCriteria: Shopping cart add/sub/list/clean require explicit merchant context in multi-merchant mode and enforce userId+merchantId isolation.
Order submit/repetition/checkout paths enforce same-merchant ownership for cart items, dishes, setmeals, and orders.
Automated validation: cart/order service and controller tests cover missing merchant, mixed-merchant payloads, and cross-merchant access rejection.
Manual validation: API calls attempting cross-merchant cart/order operations fail with business denial.

userStories.title: Merchant-scoped reporting and workspace statistics
userStories.description: As a merchant admin, I want reporting and dashboard stats scoped to my merchant so that global data is never leaked.
acceptanceCriteria: Report service paths, especially user statistics and export-related aggregation, apply resolved merchant scope for merchant accounts.
Workspace overview metrics remain merchant-scoped for merchant accounts and preserve platform visibility semantics.
Automated validation: report/workspace tests verify merchant A cannot obtain merchant B or global-only aggregates.
UI verification: dashboard/report views under merchant-admin account reflect only that merchant's data.

userStories.title: Public browsing regression protection
userStories.description: As a user, I want cross-merchant public browsing to keep working so that hardening private flows does not break discovery.
acceptanceCriteria: Public endpoints (shop/category/dish/setmeal browsing) continue to allow cross-merchant requests for enabled merchants.
Private flow hardening does not alter anonymous/public browse behavior.
Automated validation: API/controller tests confirm cross-merchant public browsing still succeeds.
UI verification: miniapp browsing can switch merchants and still load public menu/shop data.

userStories.title: ECC verification and Ralph gate evidence
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want strict verification evidence captured so that the hardening release is trustworthy and reproducible.
acceptanceCriteria: Automated validation: mvn -f core/backend/pom.xml test passes for the full backend suite.
Automated validation: in verification/e2e-tests, npx playwright test passes (including any newly added isolation cases).
Manual validation: scripts/ralph/progress.txt records per-story outcomes and unresolved risks, if any.
All stories in scripts/ralph/prd.json are updated with passes=true only after evidence is collected.
